states.name: Nike
states.title: Goddess of Victory
states.description:
Nike's talent stood out even among the temple elite. At the mere age of seventeen, her pure magical power already rivaled that of the priests. Everyone believed she was destined to become an amazing Priestess of Time.
However, that very talent, coupled with her seeming aloofness, made her the target of envy. One would often find her alone on temple grounds.

states.name: Nike
states.title: Goddess of Victory
states.description: It was during such a time that she met Rolotia. In this caged world, the way Rolotia spoke of freedom became the embodiment of hope for Nike. Yet, the hope she embraced on that day deepened the unfathomable despair she felt when Rolotia vanished.

states.name: Nike
states.title: Goddess of Victory
states.description:
Through the rift of time, Nike wandered. Millennia, millions of years, an eon passed, and there she was, alone. At long last, she found Rolotia. But this was not the Rolotia that imparted her hope all those years ago.
If that's the case, I will bring back the true Rolotia, free and unbound.
